panels.title: Circle on the Mat
panels.scene: MV gathers team in circle after class. Empty chairs = stories coming.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You don't owe me your past. But your teammates might need to hear it."

panels.title: Kian's Reason [FLASH inset]
panels.scene: Flash inset — Ttong Kim berates Kian center mat. **Entire class watching.** Kian humiliated for "acting like a clown."
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "You think this is a joke?" · Kian (present): "I wasn't laughing after that."

panels.title: Kieryn's Reason
panels.scene: Friends wave from mat — Kieryn at door with bag. Looks back once.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "My friends were there. But I'd never get better. Not at Premier."

panels.title: Ariana's Reason
panels.scene: Father and Ttong Kim handshake — Ariana ignored in corner. Father's face hardens.
panels.dialogue: Father: "She needs a coach who sees her." · Ariana: "He listened when they didn't."

panels.title: Logan's Reason
panels.scene: Logan grabs Ethan's arm at Premier door — both walking out. Gear bag too big for him.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Where you go, I go. I don't need to compete. I need my brother."

panels.title: TJ's Reason
panels.scene: Ttong Kim points at TJ alone — other students watch. TJ's form worse than flashback from old school.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "He singled me out every day. I was getting worse. Ethan was at Kwon's. I followed my friend."

panels.title: Ethan Last [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Ethan speaks one line. Team doesn't pity — nods like Karasuno hearing Hinata's backstory.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "I was good enough to be ignored." · TJ: "Not here."

panels.title: Kieryn Affirms Kian
panels.scene: Kieryn meets Kian's eyes after his humiliation story — small nod, no performance.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Good." · Kian: "...Thanks."

panels.title: Kieryn's Refusal
panels.scene: Kieryn clarifies — fist on knee, steady. Flash inset: friends waving fades to Kwon's faces.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "I wasn't abandoning them. I was refusing to rot."

panels.title: TJ Counts Them In
panels.scene: TJ looks around circle — counts teammates like headcount on a bus.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "They're here now. That counts."

panels.title: Logan on Mr. Yang
panels.scene: Logan whispers about Ariana's father — half joke, half awe.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Mr. Yang's scary. In a good way." · Ariana: "He is."

panels.title: Anchor Follows Anchor
panels.scene: Kian grins at TJ — no bite, just respect after TJ's Ethan story.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Anchor follows anchor." · TJ: "Shut up."

panels.title: Not Here — Kieryn
panels.scene: After Ethan's line — Kieryn second to answer. Fist over heart.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Not here."

panels.title: Not Here — Logan
panels.scene: Logan nods hard enough to bounce bowl cut — eyes on Ethan.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Not here."

panels.title: Not Here — Kian & Ariana
panels.scene: Split beat — Kian and Ariana same word, same beat, different energy.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Not here." · Ariana: "Not here."

panels.title: MV Small Smile
panels.scene: MV watches chorus — clipboard lowered. First real smile this arc.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *This is a team.*

panels.title: Circle Stands
panels.scene: Everyone rises from mats together — no one leads, all move at once.
panels.dialogue: *(none — synchronized stand)*

panels.title: Mats Rolled
panels.scene: Logan and TJ roll mats while others stack gear — domestic teamwork.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "I call not the heavy end." · TJ: "You always call it."

panels.title: Train Like We Mean It
panels.scene: MV at door — team lined up in doboks. Tomorrow's promise.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Good. Now we train like we mean it."

panels.title: Kwon's Light On
panels.scene: Wide exterior — Kwon's sign glows. Six silhouettes visible through window.
panels.dialogue: *(none — chapter end wide)*

panels.title: Classroom on Mats
panels.scene: MV draws score diagram on whiteboard. Team sprawled like Haikyuu study session.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Best of three. Ninety seconds per round."

panels.title: Kieryn the Professor
panels.scene: Kieryn stands — explains turning kick multiplier with finger snap.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Head kick is three. Turning head kick is six. Math isn't hard."

panels.title: Logan Lost
panels.scene: Logan raises hand — wrong answer confidently.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "So a punch is worth... ten?" · Kieryn: "You're ten."

panels.title: Kian Debates
panels.scene: Kian argues edge case — clinch kick scoring. MV patient.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "What if the ref is blind?" · MV: "Then we adapt."

panels.title: Practice Scoring
panels.scene: Pair drill — Ethan lands body kick, Logan holds scorecard wrong way.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Two points. Write it like a human."

panels.title: Team Quiz Finish
panels.scene: Everyone recites together — punch 1, body 2, head 3.
panels.dialogue: All: "Turning kicks double!" · MV: "Good. Now sweat."

panels.title: Round Structure [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV draws three round boxes on board — timer icon 1:30 each.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Win two rounds, you win the match. Lose focus in round one — you don't get a mulligan."

panels.title: Golden Point [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV adds sudden-death box — Kieryn already writing notes in margin.
panels.dialogue: MV: "One-one after three? Golden point. First clean score wins. No hiding."

panels.title: Valid Targets [TEACH]
panels.scene: Body diagram on board — hogu zone shaded, head guard highlighted, punch inset.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Chest guard only for body. Headgear for head. Punch — hogu, clean and controlled."

panels.title: Turning Multiplier Chart [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV writes multipliers — Kieryn points at 6x with smug finger snap.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Turn a kick, double the points. Turn to the head? That's six. Write it down, Logan."

panels.title: Ariana Silent Expert
panels.scene: Ariana already has rules memorized — traces scoring zones on her palm while others scramble.
panels.dialogue: Ariana: "Body two. Head three. Turning doubles." · MV: "She's not wrong."

panels.title: Ethan Knows
panels.scene: Ethan quiet in back — mouth moves silently with MV's lecture. TJ notices, doesn't call him out.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *I've heard this before. Different floor.*

panels.title: Kian Edge Case — Clinch
panels.scene: Kian stands again — diagram of clinch kick in border. MV patient.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Clinch kick to the body — two or zero depending on ref?" · MV: "Adapt. Don't argue mid-match."

panels.title: Kian Edge Case — Spinning Hook
panels.scene: Kian won't sit down — spinning hook kick diagram.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Spinning hook to head — three or six?" · MV: "Six if it turns. Stop trying to break my board."

panels.title: Electronic Hogus [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV holds chest protector — sensor lights blink on tap.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Electronic hogus register force. Light tap won't cut it. Commit."

panels.title: Practice Timer Round
panels.scene: Pair drill under MV's stopwatch — Ethan vs Kian light contact, **full kyorugi gear**.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Ninety seconds. Score like it's real." · *(timer beep)*

panels.title: Logan's Scorecard Redux
panels.scene: Logan holds paddle again — writes "10" for a body kick. Kieryn snatches card.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Two. Not ten. You're not the price tag." · Logan: "It felt like ten."

panels.title: TJ Fixes the Paddle
panels.scene: TJ rotates Logan's paddle right-side up — demonstrates proper corner display.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Red corner. Blue corner. Hold it like a human being."

panels.title: Team Call-and-Response
panels.scene: MV rapid-fire — team answers in unison like drill cadence.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Punch?" · All: "One!" · MV: "Body?" · All: "Two!" · MV: "Head?" · All: "Three!"

panels.title: Now Sweat
panels.scene: MV caps marker — tosses it to Kieryn. Team scrambles to gear bags.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Good. Now sweat." · Kieryn: "Finally."

panels.title: MV Diagram [TEACH]
panels.scene: Whiteboard — fighting stance, front leg vs back leg labeled. Red/blue fighter zones.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Front leg is fast. Back leg is power. Olympic sparring lives in the space between."

panels.title: Guard & Distance [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV demonstrates guard — hands low, chin tucked. Team copies. Logan's guard too wide.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Guard is geometry. If your hands drift, your head becomes two points — or three."

panels.title: Mirror Drill Setup
panels.scene: Ethan vs Kian — same stance line — **both in full kyorugi gear** (hogu, headgear, arm/leg guards) — MV between them.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Front leg fighter vs back leg counter. Go."

panels.title: Ethan Wins Round One [TEACH]
panels.scene: Ethan lands counter **back leg roundhouse** — MV freeze-frame inset shows hip rotation.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Two points — body. Back leg. That's the textbook."

panels.title: Kian Wins Round Two
panels.scene: Kian Whirlwind feint — tags Ethan chest.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "...Again."

panels.title: MV Notes [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: MV clipboard — writes both names with plus marks.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *They make each other honest.*

panels.title: Logan Trips
panels.scene: Logan tries mirror drill — trips over own feet. TJ catches him.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "I meant to do that." · TJ: "Sure."

panels.title: Pivot Step [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV demonstrates pivot on front foot — diagram arrow shows hip rotation without crossing feet.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Pivot, don't cross. Cross your feet, you eat a counter."

panels.title: Switch Stance Drill
panels.scene: Line drill — switch lead leg on whistle. Logan switches wrong direction.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Other switch." · Logan: "That was a switch!" · TJ: "That was chaos."

panels.title: Distance Ladder [TEACH]
panels.scene: Tape ladder on mat — in-range / out-of-range zones marked red and blue.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Olympic sparring lives in the space between. Too close — punch. Too far — nothing."

panels.title: Ariana Precision Steps
panels.scene: Ariana runs ladder — each step exact, no wasted motion. MV marks clipboard.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *She's already fighting like she has something to prove.*

panels.title: TJ Heavy Base
panels.scene: TJ's pivot cracks the mat — power stance demo for team.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Back leg power. TJ's built for it. You — find your own geometry."

panels.title: Kieryn In-and-Out
panels.scene: Kieryn blitzes in — tags paddle — bounces out before counter. Front leg speed showcase.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Front leg is fast. Watch." · Kian: "Show-off." · Kieryn: "Correct."

panels.title: Ethan vs Kian Round Three
panels.scene: Third mirror round — Ethan feints high, scores low body. Scoreboard **2-1 Ethan**.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Round three — Ethan. Front leg set up, back leg finish. Textbook."

panels.title: Mutual Bow
panels.scene: Ethan and Kian bow — foreheads almost level. Rivals, not enemies.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Again tomorrow." · Ethan: "...Yeah."

panels.title: MV Dual Notes
panels.scene: Clipboard close-up — Ethan's name: *reads tells, counter timing* · Kian's: *chaos pressure, needs discipline*.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *Different weapons. Same fire.*

panels.title: Team Mirror Lines
panels.scene: Six pairs mirror drill — whole dojang moving in staggered rhythm.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Your partner's shadow. Match their rhythm."

panels.title: Logan Second Try
panels.scene: Logan attempts mirror drill again — stays upright one full pass. TJ fist bump.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Did you see that?!" · TJ: "I saw it. Don't jinx it."

panels.title: Guard Check Lap
panels.scene: MV walks the line — taps chins down, hands up. Logan's guard still too wide.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Chin down. Hands up. Logan — narrower. You're not hugging a bear."

panels.title: Footwork Whistle
panels.scene: Team exhausted but aligned — six in matching stance at finish line. MV single whistle.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Better. Tomorrow — faster."

panels.title: Ramen Shop
panels.scene: Steam, neon sign, whole team crammed in booth — Haikyuu post-practice meal energy.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "FINALLY. Real food."

panels.title: Baseline Banter (Full)
panels.scene: Table argument — choreographed comedy beat.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Stop fighting." · Ethan: "I wasn't." · Kian: "I was." · Logan: "Can we get ramen?" · Kieryn: "You're all idiots."

panels.title: Ariana Leaves Early
panels.scene: Ariana finishes bowl fast — slides off seat. Already tying shoes.
panels.dialogue: Ariana: "Extra forms. Don't wait up."

panels.title: Logan & TJ Brother Moment
panels.scene: Logan leans on TJ's shoulder — half asleep from food coma.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "You're too big to be my brother." · TJ: "Too bad."

panels.title: Ethan Almost Smiles
panels.scene: Ethan watches group chaos — corner of mouth twitch. Headphones in lap.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "You smiling?" · Ethan: "No."

panels.title: Walk Home Group
panels.scene: Six silhouettes + MV walking same direction under streetlights.
panels.dialogue: *(none — warm silence)*

panels.title: Logan's Ramen Pitch
panels.scene: Flash inset — Logan pointing at ramen shop window earlier that week. Present: he grins with chopsticks raised.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "I told you this place had the best broth. I was right. I'm always right about food."

panels.title: Kieryn Orders for Everyone
panels.scene: Kieryn rattles off six orders to server without asking — everyone accepts.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Six miso, extra noodles for TJ, no spice for Logan, Ariana gets the small bowl." · Logan: "How do you—" · Kieryn: "I pay attention."

panels.title: Silent Eating Contest
panels.scene: Kian and Ethan eating fast — neither looking up. Kieryn times on phone.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "You two are disgusting." · Kian: "We're efficient." · Ethan: "..."

panels.title: MV Treats the Table
panels.scene: MV slides card to server — team protests. MV's look ends debate.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You showed up today. That's worth a bowl." · Logan: "Coach's buying?!" · MV: "Once."

panels.title: Soda Toast
panels.scene: Six soda cups clink — MV raises water bottle. Logan almost spills.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "To Kwon's." · All: "To Kwon's!" · Logan: "To ramen!"

panels.title: Premier Cafeteria [FLASH inset]
panels.scene: Small desaturated inset — Ethan alone at Premier plastic tray. Cut back to steam and neon.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Different table.*

panels.title: Warm Booth Contrast
panels.scene: Wide — whole team laughing, MV at end of booth. Steam fills frame like warmth.
panels.dialogue: *(none — visual contrast)*

panels.title: TJ Shares Fries
panels.scene: TJ slides tempura to Logan's bowl without comment. Logan beams.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Best brother." · TJ: "Eat before I take it back."

panels.title: Kieryn Roasts Kian
panels.scene: Kian third bowl — Kieryn arms crossed.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Where do you put it?" · Kian: "In my roundhouse chamber." · Kieryn: "You're an idiot."

panels.title: Ariana Trains Alone
panels.scene: Cutaway — Ariana in dojang window reflection, forms in empty hall. Team still at shop in inset.
panels.dialogue: Ariana (internal): *One more set.*

panels.title: Empty Seat
panels.scene: Back at booth — Ariana's empty spot. Logan saved her extra noodles under napkin.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "She'll eat later." · Ethan: "She always does."

panels.title: Headphones On
panels.scene: Walk home — Ethan puts headphones on but keeps pace with group. Not leaving — just buffering.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Playlist?" · Ethan: "Noise."

panels.title: Kwon's Sign Distance
panels.scene: Street corner — Kwon's lit sign visible down block. Team walking toward it even going separate ways.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Same time Saturday. Don't be late." · Logan: "I'll be early!"

panels.title: Same Time Next Week
panels.scene: Logan turns back walking backward — points at ramen shop neon.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Same time next week?" · Kieryn: "Only if you stop slurping loud." · Logan: "Deal!"
panels.timeline: Entire chapter is **FLASH Premier** until **15.4 PRESENT snap** on Kwon's mats.

panels.title: Young Ethan Hopeful [FLASH — dojang, earlier]
panels.scene: Colored belt Ethan wins drill — instructor used to smile here.

panels.title: VIP Lesson [FLASH — dojang]
panels.scene: Paying family private lesson — instructor hands on kid's stance.

panels.title: Knockout Bounty [REAL #28] ★ [FLASH — tournament staging]
panels.scene: Tournament staging — Ttong Kim holds **1,000 won** (천 원) — **class bounty if their student KOs another** — black belts **finish / put out** opponents — **eyes Ethan** — *too soft for black belt* — classmates watching (some grin, some shoes).
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: **"One thousand won — 천 원 — if your student knocks the other kid out. Not points. Out."** · **"Black belt doesn't mean nice. Black belt means you finish them."** · *(quieter, to Ethan)* **"Too soft. Too nice to be a real black belt."**

panels.title: Ethan in Corner [FLASH — dojang]
panels.scene: Ethan alone stretching — watches favored students from mirror reflection — **two voices**: *knock them out* / *you're too nice*.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Same floor. Different world.* · *I didn't want to knock anyone out. He said that meant I didn't belong.*

panels.title: Present Snap [PRESENT — Kwon's mats ANCHOR]
panels.scene: Ethan blinks — back on Kwon's mats. Kian: "You with us?"
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "Yeah."

panels.title: Instructor Smile Fades [FLASH]
panels.scene: Same drill win as 15.1 — instructor's smile turns off when paying parent enters frame.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "Back in line. The adults are talking."

panels.title: VIP Hands [FLASH]
panels.scene: Private lesson — instructor adjusts paying kid's stance. Hands linger too long. **Handled subtly — frame crops at shoulders.**
panels.dialogue: *(none — uncomfortable silence)*

panels.title: Parents Watching [FLASH]
panels.scene: Waiting area — paying families with clipboards. Non-paying parents on plastic chairs farther back.
panels.dialogue: Parent (O.S.): "We pay for attention. That's the arrangement."

panels.title: Ethan on Bleachers [FLASH]
panels.scene: Young Ethan sits alone on bleachers — dobok crisp, watching VIP floor through glass.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Same building. Different door.*

panels.title: Favored Corner [FLASH]
panels.scene: Senior students stretch in prime mat space — younger Ethan assigned edge near storage.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "You — corner. Watch. Maybe you'll learn."

panels.title: Bounty Grin [FLASH]
panels.scene: Classmate grins hearing knockout bounty — elbow nudges friend. Ethan in background doesn't smile.
panels.dialogue: Student: "Free money if you drop someone." · Ethan (internal): *That's not why we're here.*

panels.title: Shoes Student [FLASH]
panels.scene: Another classmate looks at floor — uncomfortable. **Shoes** detail from script — moral unease in crowd.
panels.dialogue: *(none — student staring at own shoes)*

panels.title: Too Soft Close-Up [FLASH]
panels.scene: Ttong Kim's mouth — "too soft" — young Ethan's eyes in same frame, not blinking.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "Too soft. Too nice to be a real black belt."

panels.title: Breath Between Worlds [PRESENT]
panels.scene: PRESENT — mid-drill — Ethan's vision half flash/half Kwon's. One blink splits them.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Same footwork. Different floor.*

panels.title: Present Footwork Stumble
panels.scene: PRESENT — Ethan's foot catches on mat edge mid-drill — flash ends. Kian reaches out.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Hey—" · Ethan: "I'm fine."

panels.title: Team Keeps Moving
panels.scene: PRESENT — others don't stare. Drill continues — Logan wobbles, TJ catches. Normal chaos.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Again. Focus on your own feet."

panels.title: Ethan's Hand on Mat
panels.scene: PRESENT — Ethan presses palm flat to mat — grounds himself. Breath in.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Different floor.*

panels.title: Kian Doesn't Push
panels.scene: PRESENT — Kian falls in step beside Ethan — doesn't ask questions. Just matches pace.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "...You with us?" · Ethan: "Yeah."

panels.title: MV Notices
panels.scene: PRESENT — MV sees the exchange — marks nothing on clipboard. Trust.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *He came back. That's enough today.*

panels.title: Water Break
panels.scene: PRESENT — Logan offers Ethan water bottle — Ethan takes it. Small normal thing.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "You looked far away." · Ethan: "I'm back." · Logan: "Cool. Cool cool cool."

panels.title: TJ Power
panels.scene: Shield cracks on Emperor's Kick — MV braces hard.

panels.title: Kieryn Precision [TEACH]
panels.scene: Cut kick demo — MV holds paddle low. Kieryn explains.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Cut kick — blade of the foot, thigh line. Kill their base, score on the reset."

panels.title: Logan Heart
panels.scene: Logan doing burpees after everyone else finished — TJ runs back to join.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "One more set. Together."

panels.title: Kian Chaos / Ariana Accuracy [TEACH]
panels.scene: Split — Kian wild spinning; Ariana **punch to hogu** — scoreboard inset **+1**.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Punch is one point. But only if you're brave enough to get close."

panels.title: Ethan Counters
panels.scene: Ethan reads Kian's tell — counters mid-combo. Both drop guard laughing.

panels.title: MV Whistle — Team Collapse [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Everyone flat on mats. Logan starfished. Kieryn arm over eyes.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Shower. Eat. Sleep. That's an order."

panels.title: Ethan Shadow Work
panels.scene: Early montage — Ethan alone before class, shadow counter drill in mirror.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Read. Counter. Don't hesitate.*

panels.title: Kian Whirlwind Combo
panels.scene: Kian chains spinning kicks — MV ducks paddle. Controlled chaos.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Channel it. Don't spray it." · Kian: "Spray is a style."

panels.title: Ariana Punch Repeat [TEACH]
panels.scene: Ariana drills close-range punch to hogu — same motion twenty times. Bandages neat.
panels.dialogue: MV: "One point. One inch. Again." · Ariana: *(nods)*

panels.title: Kieryn Teaches Logan
panels.scene: Kieryn adjusts Logan's chamber — patient for once. Logan listens hard.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Chamber low. Snap, don't swing." · Logan: "Like cracking a whip?" · Kieryn: "...Sure."

panels.title: TJ vs Shield Wall
panels.scene: Two teammates brace double shield — TJ's Emperor Kick still pushes them back.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Again." · MV: "You're going to crack the wall." · TJ: "Good."

panels.title: Ethan Reads Kian Tell
panels.scene: Montage callback — Ethan's eyes track Kian's shoulder drop before spin. Freeze inset on tell.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *He sees everything. He just won't pull the trigger yet.*

panels.title: Water Break Comedy
panels.scene: Logan pours water on his own head — Kieryn swats bottle.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Drink it like a person." · Logan: "Hydration is a lifestyle."

panels.title: Stretch Circle
panels.scene: Team stretch circle — MV counts. Logan counts wrong number.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Eight." · Logan: "Nine!" · All: "Eight." · Logan: "...Eight."

panels.title: Sunset Through Windows
panels.scene: Golden hour through dojang windows — dust in air, six silhouettes still drilling.
panels.dialogue: *(none — montage breath)*

panels.title: MV From the Loft
panels.scene: MV watches from balcony rail — clipboard full of plus marks. Pride restrained.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *Not ready. But close.*

panels.title: Fun Before Sweat
panels.scene: Montage beat — Logan makes TJ laugh mid-drill. MV shakes head smiling.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Focus—" · Logan: "He started it!" · TJ: "I did not."

panels.title: Silence Before Whistle
panels.scene: Drills end — heavy breathing only. Mats scuffed. Nobody moving.
panels.dialogue: *(none — heavy silence)*

panels.title: Team Photo Attempt
panels.scene: MV tries phone group photo — Logan blinks, Kian photobombs, Ethan almost smiles.
panels.dialogue: MV: "One more." · Kieryn: "You said that four times."

panels.title: Shower Order
panels.scene: Lockers — team shuffling toward showers. Logan last, still talking.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Shower. Eat. Sleep. That's an order." · Logan: "Can eating come first?" · MV: "No."

panels.title: Sloppy Spar Day
panels.scene: Team sparring messy — **full competition kit on all six** — wrong distances, early celebrates.

panels.title: MV Line
panels.scene: MV stops all rings — one whistle.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You fight like color belts. Good — that means you can still fix it."

panels.title: Reset Drill [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Basic footwork lines — six in sync. One miss — whole line resets. Logan groans.
panels.dialogue: All: "Again!" · Logan: "Again?!"

panels.title: Kian Early Celebrate
panels.scene: Kian lands kick — raises arms before ref would score. MV stops bout.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You don't get points for the dance. Reset." · Kian: "It was clean!" · MV: "Act like you've been here."

panels.title: Ethan Pulls Punch
panels.scene: Ethan has opening — pulls strike short. Kian frustrated.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Why'd you stop?" · Ethan: "Wasn't sure." · MV: "You're never sure if you don't throw."

panels.title: Kieryn Fixes Distance
panels.scene: Kieryn pulls Logan back by collar — shows arm-length measure.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "This far. Not in his lap. Not on another planet."

panels.title: TJ Calls Formation
panels.scene: TJ claps — team gathers mid-spar chaos. Anchor voice.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Pairs. Blue left. Red right. Move." · All: *(scramble to order)*

panels.title: Ariana Precision in Mess
panels.scene: While others collide — Ariana lands clean punch in chaos. Scoreboard flickers **+1**.
panels.dialogue: MV: "One point. Only one who looked like a black belt just then."

panels.title: Logan Corner Energy
panels.scene: Logan doesn't spar — cheers from corner, towel and water ready. Heart role.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Go Kieryn! Kick his whole—" · MV: "Logan. Corner. Not commentary booth."

panels.title: Wrong Distance Montage
panels.scene: Three-panel stack — too close / too far / just right (Ethan vs Kian finally).
panels.dialogue: MV: "Goldilocks sparring. Find the middle."

panels.title: Second Whistle
panels.scene: MV whistle again — whole dojang stops. Less mess than before.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Better. Still color belts. But better color belts."

panels.title: One-Two Drill
panels.scene: Structured combo drill — jab step, roundhouse, exit. Six in lines.
panels.dialogue: MV: "One-two-exit. Every time. No improv."

panels.title: Kieryn Sass Correction
panels.scene: Kieryn fixes Kian's exit step — toe tap diagram inset.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Exit means exit. Not stand there flexing." · Kian: "It's called presence."

panels.title: Ethan Commits
panels.scene: Ethan throws full combo — lands body. Small surprise on his own face.
panels.dialogue: MV: "There. Do that again." · Ethan: "...Okay."

panels.title: Logan Reset Groan
panels.scene: Footwork reset drill callback — whole line drops. Logan dramatic collapse.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Again?!" · All: "Again!" · Logan: "I hate all of you." · TJ: "Get up."

panels.title: Sync Success
panels.scene: Sixth reset — all six land same step same beat. MV pause.
panels.dialogue: MV: "...Hold that."

panels.title: MV Almost Proud
panels.scene: MV clears throat — almost smiles. Team waits for catch.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Don't get used to it. Again." · Kieryn: "There it is."

panels.title: Bow Out
panels.scene: Team bows to MV together — sharper than morning.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Fix the rest tomorrow. Dismissed."

panels.title: Gear Unmessed
panels.scene: Lockers — team peeling hogus. Logan's gear inside-out. TJ fixes it.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "How did that happen?" · TJ: "Physics."

panels.title: Not Yet Black Belt Team
panels.scene: Wide — empty dojang, gear racks, six names on MV's board. **Not tournament ready — yet.**
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *Black belts on paper. Color belts in the ring. Two weeks.*

panels.title: Ethan Card
panels.scene: Stat card — Ethan Hyun — dobok — quiet intensity.

panels.title: Ethan Stats Fill
panels.scene: Ethan's card — height/weight populate. **Style: Counter** · **Rank: TBD** · Quote slot empty.
panels.dialogue: *(card text)* Height · Weight · Style: Counter · Rank: —

panels.title: TJ Stats Fill
panels.scene: TJ card — **Style: Power** · **Role: Anchor** · teal headband icon.
panels.dialogue: *(card text)* Style: Power · Role: Anchor

panels.title: Kieryn Stats Fill
panels.scene: Kieryn card — **Style: Technician** · **Chaos: 9/10** · sass quote placeholder.
panels.dialogue: *(card text)* Style: Technician · "Math isn't hard."

panels.title: Logan Stats Fill
panels.scene: Logan card — **Competes: No** · **Role: Heart** · cheer stat maxed.
panels.dialogue: *(card text)* Role: Heart · Competes: No

panels.title: Kian Stats Fill
panels.scene: Kian card — **Style: Aggressive** · **Nickname: Whirlwind** · crown icon joke.
panels.dialogue: *(card text)* Style: Aggressive · Nickname: Whirlwind

panels.title: Ariana Stats Fill
panels.scene: Ariana card — **Style: Precision** · **Forms: Extra** · bandage icon.
panels.dialogue: *(card text)* Style: Precision · Training: +Forms

panels.title: Rival Matchup Lines
panels.scene: Six cards fanned — dotted lines between Ethan↔Kian, Kieryn↔Kian (banter), TJ↔all anchor.
panels.dialogue: *(card UI)* Rival · Partner · Anchor link labels

panels.title: MV Coach Card
panels.scene: Master Viet card — no stat bars — **Title: Coach** · Kwon's crest background.
panels.dialogue: *(card text)* Master Viet · Kwon's Taekwondo

panels.title: Kwon's Team Card
panels.scene: Group card — six portraits composite — **Team: Kwon's** · **Status: Forming**.
panels.dialogue: *(card text)* Team Kwon's · Status: Forming

panels.title: Tournament Slot Empty
panels.scene: Card back — **Next Event: Local Open** · date blank → fills with **TBD**.
panels.dialogue: *(card text)* Next Event: Local Open · Date: TBD

panels.title: Weight Class Preview
panels.scene: Ethan card flip — weight class bracket silhouette **Arc 3 hook**.
panels.dialogue: *(card text)* Weight Class: —

panels.title: Card Flip Animation
panels.scene: Sequential flip — six cards turn in cascade like opening pack.
panels.dialogue: *(SFX)* *flip flip flip*

panels.title: Reader Roster Complete
panels.scene: Full spread — all six cards + team card arranged. **Roster: 6/6**.
panels.dialogue: *(card UI)* Roster Complete

panels.title: Cards Fade to Mats
panels.scene: Cards dissolve to real team on Kwon's mats — same poses as cards but alive.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Stats don't fight. You do."

panels.title: Ethan Tenacity Flag
panels.scene: MV private talk — shows Ethan tape of him backing off after lead.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Technique is A. Courage is still hiding."

panels.title: Ariana Bandage Notice
panels.scene: MV sees tape edge on Ariana's wrist during mock bout — **both fighters in full kyorugi gear** — pauses bout.
panels.dialogue: MV: "We train smart. Not broken."

panels.title: Team Waits Outside [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Others sit hallway while each gets private eval — passing snacks, nervous energy.

panels.title: Kian Eval — Heart vs Head
panels.scene: MV office — Kian slouched. Clipboard: *A+ aggression · C patience*.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Your fire wins matches. Your temper loses them." · Kian: "So fix the temper." · MV: "That's the homework."

panels.title: Kieryn Eval — Confidence
panels.scene: Kieryn exits MV office — fist pump. Door still closing.
panels.dialogue: MV (O.S.): "Stop coaching from the floor during bouts!" · Kieryn: "That's technically advice!"

panels.title: Logan Eval — Non-Competitor Path
panels.scene: MV and Logan — Logan on chair feet dangling. No bout tape.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You don't have to compete to belong here." · Logan: "I know. I just like being part of it." · MV: "Good. Then help them win."

panels.title: TJ Eval — Anchor Grade
panels.scene: MV shows TJ tape — power A, leadership A. TJ uncomfortable with praise.
panels.dialogue: MV: "They follow you when I'm not talking. That's rare." · TJ: "They follow Ethan too." · MV: "Different kind."

panels.title: Ariana Eval — Push Too Hard
panels.scene: MV gentle — points at wrist tape. Clipboard: *A technique · B self-care*.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You're not a weapon. You're a person who fights." · Ariana: "..." · MV: "Rest is training too."

panels.title: Hallway Reactions
panels.scene: Each exit — team reads face. Kieryn thumbs up, Kian shrug, TJ nod, Ariana blank, Logan jazz hands.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "How'd it go?" · Kieryn: "He said I'm technically perfect." · Kian: "He said I'm not."

panels.title: Ethan Waits Last
panels.scene: Ethan alone in hall — last name called. Others already done — quiet pressure.
panels.dialogue: MV (O.S.): "Hyun. You're up."

panels.title: Ethan Tape Review
panels.scene: MV pauses footage — Ethan backs off after taking lead. Frame-by-frame.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You read him. You hit him. Then you gave the round back." · Ethan: "I didn't mean to." · MV: "That's the problem."

panels.title: Tenacity Flag Extended
panels.scene: MV circles **Courage** on clipboard — not cruel, precise.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Technique is A. Courage is still hiding. Premier taught you to survive, not finish."

panels.title: Ethan Almost Argues
panels.scene: Ethan's jaw tight — doesn't argue. Looks at floor then MV.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "What do you want me to do?" · MV: "Stay when you're winning."

panels.title: Bandage Callback
panels.scene: Cut to Ariana's eval replay inset — MV pausing bout for wrist. Same philosophy.
panels.dialogue: MV: "We train smart. Not broken. That goes for you too — don't break yourself holding back."

panels.title: Ethan Nods
panels.scene: Ethan single nod — accepts homework. Stands to leave.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "Stay when I'm winning." · MV: "Say it like you mean it." · Ethan: "Stay when I'm winning."

panels.title: Logan Hugs Ethan
panels.scene: Hallway — Logan tackles hug before Ethan can shut down.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "You got an A! I heard A!" · Ethan: "You weren't in there." · Logan: "I heard A energy."

panels.title: MV Clipboard Summary
panels.scene: Clipboard full — six names, six grades. **Tournament readiness: mixed**.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *Two weeks. Not enough. Has to be.*

panels.title: Team Debrief Circle
panels.scene: Brief circle — MV doesn't share grades. Just looks each in eye.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You know what I saw. Fix it before the flyer date." · All: *(nods)*

panels.title: Night Exit
panels.scene: Team splits at door — same directions as dinner chapter but heavier purpose.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Two weeks." · Kian: "Good." · Ethan: *(silent)*

panels.title: Ethan Stares at Ring
panels.scene: Ethan last out — looks at competition ring tape on floor. One breath.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Stay when I'm winning.*

panels.title: Flyer Drop
panels.scene: MV pins local tournament flyer — two weeks.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Official matches. I need to know who you are under lights."

panels.title: Reactions Montage [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Kian grin · Kieryn cracking knuckles · Logan nervous excited · Ariana tightens bandages · TJ calm · Ethan still.

panels.title: Team Huddle Hands
panels.scene: Hands stack center — Logan puts hand on top of everyone.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Kwon's on three. One—two—"

panels.title: Final — Date Circled
panels.scene: Flyer close-up — date circled red. Ethan: "I've been here before." · TJ: "Not with us."

panels.title: MV Bracket Talk
panels.scene: MV points at flyer bracket diagram — single elimination local.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Single elimination. One bad round and you're out. That's why we drill."

panels.title: Weight Class Mention
panels.scene: Flyer detail — weight classes listed. TJ finds his. Logan reads over shoulder — not on list.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Where's—" · MV: "You're support. I need you there." · Logan: "Always."

panels.title: Gear Check List
panels.scene: MV hands out checklist — hogus, headgear, mouthguard, blue/red arms.
panels.dialogue: MV: "If your gear fails inspection, you don't fight. Kieryn, you're in charge of the list."

panels.title: Kian Shadow Box
panels.scene: Kian in corner shadow boxing — grin from 20.2 continues. Humming.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Two weeks to put someone on their back." · Kieryn: "Legally." · Kian: "Obviously."

panels.title: Kieryn Knuckle Crack
panels.scene: Kieryn cracks knuckles — methodical, one by one. Focused not scared.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "I've been waiting for official lights since Premier." · Ariana: "Same."

panels.title: Ariana Bandages Tight
panels.scene: Ariana re-wraps wrist — tighter than 19.2. MV watches, says nothing this time.
panels.dialogue: Ariana (internal): *Smart. Not broken.*

panels.title: TJ Calm Center
panels.scene: TJ sits center mat — others orbit. Breathing steady.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "We know the rules. We know each other. That's more than most teams."

panels.title: Ethan Still
panels.scene: Ethan statue-still — flyer reflection in his eyes. Hands at sides.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Official matches. Lights.*

panels.title: Huddle Hands In
panels.scene: Callback to 20.3 — hands stack tighter. Six plus MV's hand on outside.
panels.dialogue: MV: "I'm not in the ring. You are. Make me unnecessary."

panels.title: Kwon's on Three
panels.scene: Full huddle — faces in. Logan mouth "three" early.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Kwon's on three. One—two—" · All: "KWON'S!"

panels.title: Training Intensifies Montage
panels.scene: Three-panel — dawn drill / midday spar / night forms. Calendar pages flip.
panels.dialogue: *(SFX)* *flip flip flip*

panels.title: Flyer on Every Wall
panels.scene: Flyer copies multiply — locker, mirror, front door. Logan put extras everywhere.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "So we don't forget!" · Kieryn: "We won't." · Logan: "YOU don't know us yet."

panels.title: Countdown — One Week
panels.scene: Calendar close-up — one week circled. Ethan's finger traces date.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Not with them last time.*

panels.title: Night Before Energy
panels.scene: Team messages phone group chat inset — "Tomorrow." thumbs up storm.
panels.dialogue: Logan (text): "LET'S GOOO" · Ethan (text): "..." · Kieryn (text): "Sleep, idiot."

panels.title: Arc 2 Wide — Team at Door
panels.scene: Wide — six in doboks at dojang door. Flyer date glows behind them. Arc 2 closing shot.
panels.dialogue: MV: "After you."

panels.title: Final — Not With Us
panels.scene: Callback 20.4 — Ethan and TJ shoulder to shoulder. Date circled red sharp.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "I've been here before." · TJ: "Not with us." · *(chapter end)*
